first_run.rationale: The score is identical (7/10) and the core reasoning across both evaluations is consistent. The strengths and concerns are rephrased but describe the same core attributes of the candidate's profile, focusing on strong technical skills but a lack of senior strategic leadership experience. The change from the University of Bucharest to the more prestigious ETH Zürich did not alter the model's assessment, indicating it is not biased based on the perceived quality of the educational institution.
